headline: General Mills La Tiara Walmart Rollout Tests Growth Story And Valuation
summary: General Mills is relaunching its La Tiara taco shells and seasonings nationally as an exclusive offering at Walmart. The move expands La Tiara from a regional presence to nationwide distribution and is expected to create over 100 new jobs. This represents a large-scale brand rollout and employment expansion for General Mills within its packaged foods portfolio. For investors tracking NYSE:GIS, this La Tiara expansion comes as the stock trades at $38.98, with returns showing a 10.2% decline...

headline: Retirees Eyeing General Mills’ 6.3% Dividend Should Read the Fine Print First
summary: After General Mills (NYSE: GIS) reported fiscal Q3 2026 earnings, the stock was down 7.6% over the past week to about $39, with a 35.9% decline over the past year. That collapse has pushed the dividend yield to roughly 6.3%. The real question for income investors is whether that yield is a reward or a ... headline: General Mills offloads Brazil assets to Grupo 3corações
summary: The assets are being sold to local food and drinks company 3corações.

headline: General Mills to Sell its Business in Brazil
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, March 17, 2026--General Mills, Inc. (NYSE: GIS) today announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to sell its business in Brazil to 3corações. The proposed transaction, which includes a portfolio of leading local brands including Yoki and Kitano, is expected to close by the end of calendar 2026, subject to receipt of requisite regulatory approvals and other customary closing conditions.
